title: pypptx CLI — PowerPoint manipulation toolkit
description: Feature container for the full pypptx CLI implementation. All concrete work is expressed in children. This bead is not runnable — it exists only to anchor the dependency tree.
acceptance_criteria: All child beads are complete and their acceptance criteria are satisfied.
`pip install -e .` succeeds and `pypptx --version` prints the version.
Every command writes structured JSON to stdout by default and switches to human-readable text with --plain.
Errors always go to stderr; exit code is non-zero on failure.
